label: The Ultimate Test of Embodied Intelligence
title: Whole-Body Dexterous Manipulation
description: Dexterity is intelligence expressed through contact. Enabling robots to interact with the rich physical world requires deep integration of skills bridging perception, reasoning, learning, and control.

highlights.title: SimToolReal: An Object-Centric Policy for Zero-Shot Dexterous Tool Manipulation
ARCap: Collecting High-quality Human Demonstrations for Robot Learning with Augmented Reality Feedback
